name: The Crew Has It
overview: Gianni Paolo and Michael Rainey Jr have teamed up to give fans an inside look at the entire Power universe. In the first episode the actors will tell you how they got on the Starz series and reveal some never told before stories from on set.

trailers.title: How We Got on Power, Actors Michael Rainey Jr & Gianni Paolo Reveal | EP 1 | The Crew Has It
